basics.name: Alex Bramwell
basics.label: UX Engineer / Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Design-trained frontend engineer with 7+ years building production SaaS interfaces. I own the full pipeline, from Figma wireframes through to deployed React components, with deep expertise in design systems, WCAG accessibility, and mobile-first UX.

work.summary: UX Engineer on a seven-module enterprise SaaS platform for document management, composition, and data processing for large postal clients across Europe. Designed across the whole product, wrote production React, and maintained a Storybook component library backed by a Figma design system.
highlights: Built and maintained the MailMetrics component library in Storybook.js, a token-based design system spanning the full product suite.
Delivered 18-screen wireframe specification for ESB Networks' stock management system, translating complex requirements into WCAG-compliant responsive UI.
Developed MFA frontend flows and user management modules in React + TypeScript within a .NET ecosystem.
Mentored junior developers through technical presentations covering search, document retrieval, and user management architecture.

work.summary: Worked on customer communications management tooling for enterprise clients, getting deeper into the design-to-engineering handoff side of things.
highlights: Led digital transformation using Quadient Inspire CCM software, bridging design and technical delivery for enterprise communications.
Translated complex CCM workflows into user-centred interfaces for regulated, high-volume document outputs.

work.summary: UX on care management software. Very technical, regulated workflows, users who need clarity over anything else.
highlights: Delivered responsive, accessible frontend solutions across B2B SaaS products: component architecture, accessibility audits, and design system work.

work.summary: UI design on ERP software for the plant hire industry. Complex, workflow-heavy tracks for operations teams alongside developing the marketing website.
highlights: Designed and developed UI for ERP software serving the plant hire industry.
Built and maintained the company marketing website.

projects.name: NoSweat Fitness
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for gyms. Each gym gets a fully branded site with class booking, WOD programming, Stripe payments, coach profiles, and a member dashboard. Designed and built end-to-end as a solo project.

projects.name: MailMetrics Design System
projects.description: Token-based Storybook component library powering the full MailMetrics product suite. Single source of truth for colours, spacing, and typography. Full WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across every component.

projects.name: ESB Networks - 18-Screen Spec
projects.description: Translated a complex requirements catalogue into an 18-screen wireframe specification for ESB Networks' stock management system. Delivered responsive, WCAG-compliant UI from initial discovery through to client-approved handoff.
